B1 Modern Family / Sitcom / Family Dinner ~70s · 今天 ←

Dunphy Family Dinner

100Ls Shadowing Material · Lesson 06  ·  ← 上一课
🎧 Main Audio
0:00 / 0:00
今天听了 0 遍
📜 Dialog Script
PhilSo, you guys are NOT gonna believe what happened at work today.
ClairePhil, can it wait? Haley, put your phone away. We're having family time.
HaleyMom, I'm literally just checking one text. It's important.
ClaireMore important than dinner with your family?
Haley...Yes?
PhilAnyway! So there I was, showing a house to this couple, and guess who walks in?
ClaireWho?
PhilTheir marriage counselor! Awkward, right? They started arguing about who gets the house in the divorce!
ClaireOh no. What did you do?
PhilWhat any good realtor would do. I offered them BOTH my card.
ClairePhil!
PhilWhat? Two divorces, two house sales. That's just good business.
HaleyDad, that's actually kind of smart.
PhilThank you, Haley! See, Claire? The kids get it.
ClaireThe kids are on their phones.
PhilWell, at least someone appreciates my hustle.
Phil: 你们绝对不会相信今天上班发生了什么。
Claire: Phil，能等一下吗？Haley，把手机收起来。我们在享受家庭时光。
Haley: 妈，我真的只是看一条短信。很重要的。
Claire: 比和家人吃饭还重要？
Haley: ……是的？
Phil: 总之！我当时正在给一对夫妻看房，猜猜谁走进来了？
Claire: 谁？
Phil: 他们的婚姻顾问！超尴尬对吧？他们开始争论离婚后谁能拿到房子！
Claire: 天哪。那你怎么做的？
Phil: 任何好的房产经纪人都会做的事——我给他们俩都递了名片。
Claire: Phil！
Phil: 怎么了？两场离婚，两笔房产交易。这就是好生意。
Haley: 爸，这其实还挺聪明的。
Phil: 谢谢你，Haley！看到没，Claire？孩子们懂我。
Claire: 孩子们在看手机呢。
Phil: 好吧，至少有人欣赏我的拼劲。
🎯 Sentence Practice
📚 Vocabulary
literally/ˈlɪtərəli/adv
字面上；（口语）真的、确实
常见搭配
literally justliterally can'tliterally the best
例句
I literally can't even right now.
我现在真的不行了。（口语夸张用法）
awkward/ˈɔːkwərd/adj
尴尬的；笨拙的
常见搭配
awkward silencefeel awkwardawkward moment
例句
There was an awkward silence after he said that.
他说完后出现了一阵尴尬的沉默。
marriage counselor/ˈmærɪdʒ ˈkaʊnsələr/n
婚姻顾问
常见搭配
see a counselorcouples counseling
例句
They started seeing a marriage counselor last month.
他们上个月开始看婚姻顾问了。
divorce/dɪˈvɔːrs/n/v
离婚
常见搭配
get a divorcefile for divorcedivorce rate
例句
They decided to get a divorce after 10 years.
十年后他们决定离婚。
realtor/ˈriːəltər/n
房产经纪人（美式用法）
常见搭配
real estate agentlicensed realtor
例句
Our realtor found us the perfect house.
我们的房产经纪人帮我们找到了完美的房子。
hustle/ˈhʌsəl/n/v
拼劲、努力赚钱；忙碌
常见搭配
side hustlehustle and grindrespect the hustle
例句
I've got a side hustle selling stuff online.
我有个副业是在网上卖东西。
🔗 Connected Speech
you guys are
/jə gaɪz ər/
连读 Linking
"you" 弱化为 /jə/，"guys are" 连读成一个流畅的单元。
can it wait
/kænɪt weɪt/
连读 Linking
"can it" 连读，/n/ 和 /ɪ/ 自然连接，听起来像 "канит"。
put your
/pʊtʃər/
腭化 Palatalization
/t/ + /j/ 结合变成 /tʃ/（类似 "ch"），这是美式英语常见的腭化现象。
What did you
/wʌdɪdʒə/
连读 + 腭化
"What did" 连读，"did you" 腭化成 /dɪdʒə/，整体非常紧凑。
kind of
/kaɪndə/
弱化 Reduction
"of" 弱化为 /ə/，口语中极其常见，也常写作 "kinda"。
